requests.prompt: A dark Chinese underworld government office, traditional imperial Chinese architecture with mahogany wooden desk, bamboo scrolls, a judge's brush, and an eternal oil lamp on the desk. Incense smoke rising softly. Long queue of ethereal ghost spirit figures waiting outside in dim corridor. Red Chinese lanterns, paper talismans on walls, mysterious dark atmosphere. Cinematic dark fantasy style, moody lighting, painterly texture, no text, no watermark
